prompt: A hyper-realistic, cinematic wide shot of a high-end, dimly lit tailor's atelier. In the center, a wooden mannequin stands. An elderly tailor is meticulously pinning a bespoke charcoal suit jacket. However, the jacket is not being fitted to the mannequin; the fabric is being stretched and pinned in complex, jagged, irrational patterns to perfectly match the deep, random wrinkles and shadows of a heavy, crumpled backdrop of industrial canvas behind it. The mannequin is ignored; the 'fit' is obsessed with the background noise. Photorealistic, 8k, masterwork, no text, no diagrams.
metaphor: A suit being tailored to the random wrinkles of a backdrop rather than the mannequin; the model captures the noise instead of the underlying signal.
